name: Special Burritos Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Night before beginning cooking, place 2 lbs. chuck roast in the crock pot and cook on low heat all night.
2. In the morning, remove the bones from the roast.
3. Add the chopped Ortega peppers, meat from bones, chopped onion, and tomato sauce to the crockpot.
4. Cook on low heat for the remainder of the day.
5. Once cooked, add the mixture to flour tortillas.
6. Also add refried beans, sour cream, and grated cheese with the meat.
7. Wrap the assembled burritos in foil.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
